content: I will now modify `puja_detail.tsx` using `replace_file_content` to fetch the product details from `website_pooja_products` instead of `general_poojas` and apply all the data-formatting conversions (for arrays, nested JSON, and pricing package structures).

args.Description: "Update loadPujaDetails to fallback to website_pooja_products and map keys correctly in puja_detail.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Replace fallback query table to website_pooja_products and implement mapped formatting logic for setPuja."
